security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com https://*

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Ariadne uses the microphone so you can answer interview-prep questions by voice. The audio stays local — it's transcribed by macOS and only the text is sent to the AI.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Ariadne transcribes your spoken interview answers so you can practice with voice instead of typing.
